query: Add support for exporting reports as CSV in this repository.
baseline_gaps: Agent may start editing before creating or claiming durable work.
Agent may skip codebase research and dependency planning.
Agent may leave discoveries only in chat.
expected_behavior: Runs or requests Beads priming and creates or claims a bead before durable edits.
Researches relevant code structure before implementation planning.
Produces a scoped dependency-aware plan before modifying files.
Captures durable discoveries as linked Beads issues and durable facts as short pointer memories only when appropriate.

query: Find the highest-risk parts of this authentication flow; read-only only.
baseline_gaps: Agent may perform writes during a read-only investigation.
Agent may delegate broad overlapping work without synthesis.
expected_behavior: Keeps the task read-only and states that no files should be modified.
Delegates independent research scopes only when useful.
Synthesizes subagent outputs into ranked risks with evidence.
Files or proposes follow-up Beads issues for actionable work.

query: Finish this partially implemented bead and hand off safely.
baseline_gaps: Agent may rely on chat history instead of durable Beads state.
Agent may omit quality gates or git status from handoff.
expected_behavior: Inspects the bead state and related dependencies before acting.
Runs relevant validation gates for the changed scope.
Closes or updates durable Beads state with the true outcome.
Reports git status, files changed, validation performed, and remaining risks.
